sourceObservation: Derived from the focus rendered sample: a compact schedule label, centered title and large time range, one alert line, and one bottom focus/action pill.
layoutSummary: Vertical schedule stack optimized for one upcoming event and one action/support pill.
allowedEdits: delete alertRow and increase eventTitle height when alert is unavailable
add onClick to actionPill only with valid event capability
forbiddenEdits: split one event into repeated labels
show time twice under different labels
deleteRules: If event.title exceeds the protected width, shorten title; if it still cannot fit, abandon this 2x2 template and re-evaluate size/layout through the normal rules.

colorPolicy.budget: one temporal orange scene family plus neutral glass action

roles.alertLine: on-color support text unless the event is truly warning/alert

rewriteRules: Do not use yellow or alert color for ordinary reminder text.
Use warning/alert only for genuine risk states, not normal meeting reminders.
